metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for developer workflows.

plugins.name: export-chat-logs
plugins.description: Export Claude Code and Cowork chat logs as HTML or Markdown, zip them, and send via Telegram.

plugins.name: protoc-java-gen
plugins.description: Generate Java from .proto files using a specific protoc version and auto-copy to subprojects.

plugins.name: obsidian-kb
plugins.description: Obsidian-based persistent knowledge base for Claude Code — installs ingest/lint/stats/import into your vault, supports multi-contributor wiki with author attribution.
